validation_evidence.command: cd desktop; bun run test src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/api/skills.test.ts src/__tests__/skillsSettings.test.tsx
validation_evidence.summary: 3 test files collected and executed: 62 tests total, 59 passed, 3 failed. Failures are expected RED behavior assertions, not syntax/setup/import failures.

expected_red_failures.test: skillsApi > requests workflow-safe catalog filtering without loading skill contents
expected_red_failures.reason: skillsApi.catalog ignores the workflowOnly option and omits workflowOnly=true from the catalog query.

expected_red_failures.test: WorkflowStatusPanel > shows recommended skill status labels provenance and relevant evidence details
expected_red_failures.reason: WorkflowStatusPanel shows recommended skill names and aggregate counts but not visible source/provenance/status labels or used/skipped/unavailable evidence details.

expected_red_failures.test: Settings > Skills tab > filters workflow catalog entries by status and provenance without hidden execution affordances
expected_red_failures.reason: Skills settings search does not include catalogStatus/provenance identity and the list does not surface plugin-disabled/reference/content-hash metadata.

non_blocking_warnings: Existing WorkflowTemplateEditor tests emit React act warnings unrelated to the T009 RED assertions.

must_preserve_evidence.MP-005: Tests keep recommended skills as references/status metadata and assert no run, execute, install, or enable controls are exposed from recommendation visibility.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-006: Tests require source/provenance identity for same-name/catalog entries, including pluginName, referenceId, contentHash, and visible source labels.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-010: Status panel tests preserve authority separation by checking recommended-skill visibility does not add execution controls and by leaving pending confirmation priority coverage intact.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-008: Desktop UI tests require explicit visible status/provenance/evidence states instead of misleading aggregate-only UI.

coverage_added: used evidence with rationale, toolUseId, and artifactRef
unavailable/degraded status labels for missing, plugin-disabled, and unsupported-source
CA-006.red_result: The current status panel omits these details, proving skills can still be run/skipped/unavailable invisibly beyond aggregate counts.

coverage_added: workflow catalog query flag in skillsApi
settings catalog filtering by status/provenance metadata without hidden auto-run affordances
CA-008.red_result: The current UI/API shape is underspecified for workflow-safe catalog filtering and explicit recommended-skill status visibility.

recovery_guidance: T010 should add a workflowOnly catalog option to desktop/src/api/skills.ts and preserve catalogStatus/provenance fields without requesting skill detail bodies.
T010 should render recommended skill source, status, plugin/provenance, and relevant evidence details in WorkflowStatusPanel while continuing to filter irrelevant unused recommendations.
T010 should make Skills settings search/display include workflow catalog status and provenance metadata without adding run/install/enable controls.
